116498.headline: Torovar Household was founded.
116498.description: Torovar Household was founded in Riveria by Sable Torovar the 3rd and Ewan Caldton.

116499.headline: Torovar Household House Lot was claimed.
116499.description: Sable Torovar the 3rd claimed home in Riveria. Its recorded value was 30.6.
